divergences: Desktop wallpaper is a CSS gradient approximation of a photographic macOS wallpaper; fine-grained blur/noise and exact diagonal-band curvature cannot be matched pixel-for-pixel with flat radial/linear gradients.

Content (search query 'safari', selected 'Safari' row with Safari app icon, header chips, 'Script Kit · GPT-5.5' model label, footer 'Run ↵' / 'Actions ⌘ K') was verified against the reference and matches exactly; no content corrections were needed.
Window geometry (left/top/width/height, footer height, row pitch) measured via luminance-edge scan and confirmed within ~1px of the existing draft; no structural changes were needed.
